items.title: Determination of Independent Audit Firm
items.content:
Çimsa Çimento Sanayi ve Ticaret A.Ş. announced the selection and registration of its independent audit firm.

DRT Bağımsız Denetim ve Serbest Muhasebeci Mali Müşavirlik A.Ş. was selected as the independent audit firm at the General Assembly meeting held on March 27, 2025, for the period of 01.01.2025-31.12.2025. This selection was registered by the Istanbul Trade Registry Directorate on April 2, 2025, and published in the Trade Registry Gazette dated April 3, 2025, and numbered 11304.

items.title: ÇİMSA ÇİMENTO SANAYİ VE TİCARET A.Ş. General Assembly Meeting Results
items.content:
This announcement details the results of Çimsa Çimento Sanayi ve Ticaret A.Ş.'s Ordinary General Assembly meeting held on March 27, 2025. The meeting approved the financial statements for 2024, the distribution of profits, and amendments to the company's articles of association.

The General Assembly approved the 2024 financial statements, the distribution of profits, and the authorization of the Board of Directors to distribute advance dividends for the 2025 fiscal year. An amendment to Article 6 of the Company Articles of Association was also approved. The meeting also included the election of auditors and the determination of fees for board members. The registration of the General Assembly decisions was completed on April 2, 2025, and published in the Turkish Trade Registry Gazette on April 3, 2025.
